Worked across the full stack on a B2B SaaS analytics product. Joined as
the third backend hire and helped scale the team and the codebase.

- Re-architected the reporting service to handle 10x customer growth
  without a corresponding cost increase.
- Wrote and shepherded the first comprehensive test suite for the
  analytics pipeline (87% coverage at handover).
- Built the customer-facing CSV export feature that became the #1
  reason cited in renewal interviews.
